category_sources: source_facts.description says JavaScript framework for responsive email; official MJML site calls it a responsive email framework.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation consistently use MJML as the product name.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to documentation.mjml.io as Documentation; documentation site is the MJML guide.
repo_sources: Official MJML homepage links to GitHub; official documentation includes development instructions cloning https://github.com/mjmlio/mjml.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official MJML site describe responsive email framework, semantic syntax, CLI usage, and JavaScript implementation.
